/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/budget_module.dir/link.d -shared  -o budget_module.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/budget_module.dir/src/algorithms/brute_force.cpp.o CMakeFiles/budget_module.dir/src/algorithms/greedy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/budget_module.dir/src/bindings.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libpython3.13.so
